Records.description: Equal-mass one-loop two-point function I_{nu1 nu2}(D,x) with q1=k-p, q2=k, m1=m2=m, x=-p^2/m^2. Used as worked IBP and differential-equation example: IBP reduces all integer (nu1,nu2) to two masters {I_{11}, I_{10}}; pre-canonical 2x2 DE matrix in eq. example_A_oneloop_twopoint and eps-form transformation in eq. trafo_bubble produce uniform-weight expansions in 4D and 2D (eqs. example_bubble_uniform_weight_4D/2D).
Records.location: Chapter 'Iterated integrals', Eq. (chapter_iterated_integrals:example_equal_mass_bubble, line ~113); Example 1 of Sec. 'Differential equations' line ~922

Records.description: One-loop bubble with equal internal masses. Used to demonstrate expansion by regions in large-mass and small-mass limits with pySecDec.

One-loop equal-mass banana (bubble) integral in D=2-2eps dimensions. Trivial case: the change of variables from y to q-bar rationalises the square root sqrt(1+4y). Two master integrals I_{10} and I_{11}. Discussed as the l=1 degenerate case of the all-loop formula.
Records.location: Eq.(1), Section 5.1 (The degenerate cases, one-loop subsection)
